artPrompt: A wide sunlit common stretched into a wide landscape view: an open grassy green ringed by picket fences and tidy front yards, empty folding tables and a lone bullhorn resting in the golden afternoon, no figures present. Washes of leafy green and warm ivory bleed across the lawn, distant rooftops dissolving into light. A quiet civic stage between rallies, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: The Old Town Green
text:
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.
{2}, {T}: Create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. Activate only if you control three or more other lands. (Plenty of room on the green for a rally.)
flavorText: Site of every town meeting, every potluck, every recall, and one regrettable hot-air-balloon festival nobody discusses.
